task_updates.executor_notes: I could not execute the manual checklist from this terminal session because there is no browser automation or dedicated e2e/manual harness available in the repo for these editor interactions. Code inspection confirms the targeted behaviors are implemented, including mixed-value placeholders, bulk tab visibility, multi-track movement wiring, batch split-at-playhead wiring, and entrance-effect bulk updates preserving each clip's existing `entrance.duration`, but the interactive UI checklist remains outstanding.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Code inspection confirms the bulk Entrance select uses `onChangeDeep((meta) => ({ entrance: value === NO_EFFECT ? undefined : { type: value, duration: meta.entrance?.duration ?? 0.4 } }))`, so clips that already have an `entrance.duration` keep their own value; `0.4` is only used when a clip has no existing duration. This was verified from code, not by manual UI execution.
